title: Service and maintain electrical components in hybrid electric vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and maintain electrical components in hybrid electric vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to service and maintain electrical components in HEVs and PHEVs

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements and AS 5732 Electric vehicle operations - Maintenance and repair1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to service and maintain electrical components in HEVs and PHEVs

elements.title: Test electrical systems and components

pcs.text: Diagnostic equipment is used to retrieve system parameters and information2.2 HEV or PHEV systems and components are tested for electrical efficiency according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Electrical circuits are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Faults in HEV or PHEV electrical systems and components are identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Diagnostic equipment is used to retrieve system parameters and information2.2 HEV or PHEV systems and components are tested for electrical efficiency according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Electrical circuits are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Faults in HEV or PHEV electrical systems and components are identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Diagnostic equipment is used to retrieve system parameters and information2.2 HEV or PHEV systems and components are tested for electrical efficiency according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Electrical circuits are tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.4 Faults in HEV or PHEV electrical systems and components are identified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Test electrical systems and components

elements.title: Service and maintain electrical systems and components

pcs.text: Problems associated with performance of electrical systems and components are identified, and appropriate corrective action is taken3.2 Faults within electrical systems and components are identified and required corrective action is taken or reported according to workplace procedures3.3 Components are repaired, replaced and adjusted according to manufacturer and component specifications and workplace procedures 3.4 Post-service testing is carried out to ensure correct and safe operation of HEV and PHEV, any reported problems are resolved, and no other problems are present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Problems associated with performance of electrical systems and components are identified, and appropriate corrective action is taken3.2 Faults within electrical systems and components are identified and required corrective action is taken or reported according to workplace procedures3.3 Components are repaired, replaced and adjusted according to manufacturer and component specifications and workplace procedures 3.4 Post-service testing is carried out to ensure correct and safe operation of HEV and PHEV, any reported problems are resolved, and no other problems are present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Problems associated with performance of electrical systems and components are identified, and appropriate corrective action is taken3.2 Faults within electrical systems and components are identified and required corrective action is taken or reported according to workplace procedures3.3 Components are repaired, replaced and adjusted according to manufacturer and component specifications and workplace procedures 3.4 Post-service testing is carried out to ensure correct and safe operation of HEV and PHEV, any reported problems are resolved, and no other problems are present.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service and maintain electrical systems and components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or equipment is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
